headlines.headline: Yorval Partners revises long-term strategy with focus on enterprise software

sentiment.reasoning: A strategic pivot to enterprise software indicates a long-term shift in business model but lacks immediate financial impact.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
